Description.value: Fixes Bloodfall Hell tools (Hellpick/Hellaxe/Hellshovel) recipes that miss the `learnable` tag. Without `learnable`, Bloodfall's craftingHarvestingTools Lv60 RecipeTagUnlocked never engages and the tools become craftable from the start despite the skill panel showing them as locked. This patch adds `learnable` to wire the lock up so Bloodfall's intended Lv60 gating works as designed.
